query:
SELECT
                uuid, id, name
            FROM
                pk_systems
            LEFT JOIN
                pk_system_fronters
            ON pk_systems.uuid = pk_system_fronters.system_uuid
            WHERE
                updated_at IS NULL
            OR
                updated_at <= NOW() - interval '10 minutes'
            ORDER BY
                updated_at
            ASC NULLS FIRST
            LIMIT 10
